title: greg paintings
body:
Features offered by the project:

Adds a variety of new paintings themed around GregTech.
Paintings include iconic items, machines, and GregTech.
How those features affect a user's experience:

Enhances the visual aesthetic of Minecraft with GregTech-themed artwork.
Provides players with more decorative options to personalize their builds.
Increases immersion for players who enjoy the GregTech mod, making their game environment more cohesive and enjoyable.
also you can freely use my mod in your modpack

little update: source code is not available because i lost it (bruuh💀)
If you want you can use textures from this mod in your mods or resource packs, if you want to publish it please mention me or this project.
